---
title: "The Rev. Canon Frederick Beadon"
---

## The Rev. Canon Frederick Beadon

**Dates:** (1777-1879)

### Description

Rector of North Stoneham and Canon of Wells Cathedral, centenarian

### Biography

ODNB

### Letters

- Letter from Jany 27th 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
